instruction: Use our secure verification partner SumSub to confirm your identity. Continuing on your phone is the easiest way to complete these steps.
setupAccountsHeader: Setup your withdrawal and repayment bank accounts to access your funds
setupAccountsBody: Now that a beneficial owner has been verified, you’re almost ready to access your funds!
mainUserReminder: If you’re the main user of your Uncapped account, remember to log back into your portal and complete the final steps

StatusModalsDenied.header: Unfortunately, we haven’t been able to complete our checks
StatusModalsDenied.copy: We will be in touch by email with more information about next steps. If you don’t hear from us in the next 48 hours, please get in touch at support@uncapped-demo.invalid
